message:
feat: add gt upgrade command for post-binary migration

Implements a user-facing entry point that orchestrates post-install
migrations after binary updates. Runs five steps in order:

1. Structural checks via doctor --fix
2. CLAUDE.md sync from embedded template
3. Daemon.json lifecycle defaults
4. Hooks registry sync to settings.json
5. Formula updates from embedded copies

Supports --dry-run, --verbose, and --no-start flags. Added to
beads-exempt and branch-check-exempt command lists.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
